function_calls.name: set_specialist_briefs
function_calls.args_excerpt: {"briefs": {"menu_pricing": "Analyze the live menu pricing and delivery platforms for Monsun (\u015awi\u0119toja\u0144ska 49, Gdynia) and its competitive set: Bar Mleczny S\u0142oneczny, T\u0142usta Kaczka, Kurkuma Cafe, and Pueblo Desayuno. Pull current pricing data from delivery apps like Pyszne.pl, Wolt, Glovo, Uber Eats, and Bolt Food to determine actual menu prices and identify which platforms each venue uses. Compare dine-in pricing versus delivery markups, and identify any active promotions, lunch deals, or trending dietary items. Do not analyze social media engagement or advertising spend, as the marketing_digital specialist covers that area. Output a structured comparison highlighting average dish prices, price ranges, and delivery markups across the competitive set.", "marketing_digital": "Research the digital marketing presence of Monsun (\u015awi\u0119toja\u0144ska 49, Gdynia) and its competitors: Bar Mleczny S\u0142oneczny, T\u0142usta Kaczka, Kurkuma Cafe, and Pueblo Desayuno. Analyze live Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook activity, including follower counts, engagement, and posting cadence. Check the Meta Ad Library for active ads, focusing on how these venues promote their pricing, lunch deals, or special offers. Evaluate their delivery-platform positioning regarding rankings, photo quality, and menu completeness, as well as their Google Business Profile presence. Do not extract specific menu prices or delivery markups, as the menu_pricing specialist will handle that data. Provide an output detailing the promotional strategies, ad spend signals, and overall digital brand momentum for each venue."}}
